prompt: Write a reggae-style chord pattern — stabs on the off-beats (upstrokes on the and of every beat).

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p _e e _e e _e e _e e
    n 48 48 48 48

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p _e e _e e _e e _e e
    n 53 53 53 53

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly used the pattern '_e e _e e _e e _e e' which perfectly places the notes on the off-beats (the 'and' of every beat) as requested.
judgment.quality_reason: The rhythm is musically correct for a reggae skank, though the AI used single notes instead of full chords for the chord track.
